chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.510 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 30.04.2025 Mr. Shabbir Ahmed Kumbhar, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Daud Narejo, advocate for complainant ------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the instant bail application at some length, does not press the same on merits and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period two months. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh as well as counsel for complainant have recorded no objection for issuance of such directions. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed on merits, however, with direction to the learned trial Court to decide the case of the applicant/accused preferably within a period of two months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
